case_title: JENNIFER WALLING VS. KENT ELLIS ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-03-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-03-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF JENNIFER WALLING & DEFENDANT KENT ELLIS, DBA PINTLER MEDICAL, LLC. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MARY BETH ELLIS. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE FOR EITHER DEFENDANT, BUT DEFENDANT KENT ELLIS WAIVED SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AT TODAY'S HEARING. EXHIBIT NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WALLING, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT ELLIS, KENT DBA PINTLER MEDICAL LLC. ELLIS, MARY BETH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-03-2016 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-03-2016 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WALLING, JENNIFER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ELLIS, KENT DBA PINTLER MEDICAL LLC. ELLIS, MARY BETH STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
